<h3><a name="p-11992-announcements-3" class="anchor" href="#p-11992-announcements-3" aria-label="Heading link"></a>Announcements:</h3>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Community <a href="https://discuss.layer5.io">Discussion Forum</a> migrated from AWS to OCI</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>(currently running in a VM with Docker as a single container with database connected to managed OCI Postgres)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Dogfooding with Meshery.</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
